notableEvents.label: Ty France pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Ty France grounds into a force out, shortstop Trea Turner to second baseman Bryson Stott. Jase Bowen out at 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Bryson Stott GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Bryson Stott grounds into a double play, first baseman Gavin Sheets to shortstop Xander Bogaerts to first baseman Gavin Sheets. Brandon Marsh out at 2nd. Bryson Stott out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Alec Bohm GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Alec Bohm grounds into a double play, shortstop Xander Bogaerts to second baseman Sung-Mun Song to first baseman Gavin Sheets. Bryce Harper scores. Brandon Marsh out at 2nd. Alec Bohm out at 1st.
